properties.entry: INSERT INTO reservation (user_id, room_id, room_name, name, check_in, check_out, adult_count, child_count, total_price, status) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, '1')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE room_id = ? AND status IN ('1', '2') AND (check_in < ? AND check_out > ?)
SELECT room_id, check_in, check_out FROM reservation WHERE status IN ('1', '2') AND check_out >= CURDATE()
UPDATE reservation SET status = '3' WHERE reservation_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE user_id=? AND password=?
UPDATE users SET email=?, phone=? WHERE user_id=?
UPDATE users SET password=? WHERE user_id=?
SELECT room_id, check_in, check_out FROM reservation WHERE status IN ('1', '2') AND check_out >= CURDATE() AND reservation_id != ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE room_id = ? AND reservation_id != ? AND status IN ('1', '2') AND (check_in < ? AND check_out > ?)
UPDATE reservation SET room_id = ?, room_name = ?, check_in = ?, check_out = ?, adult_count = ?, child_count = ?, total_price = ? WHERE reservation_id = ?
SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY reservation_id DESC
UPDATE reservation SET room_id = ?, room_name = ?, check_in = ?, check_out = ?, adult_count = ?, child_count = ?, total_price = ? WHERE reservation_id = ?
